titlestmt.titleproper: Milton Glass files on Kitimat Canada6896
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-02-09 18:23:47 -0500.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Milton Glass files on Kitimat Canada
did.physdesc: Correspondence, maps, photographs, plans, printed materials, publications
did.abstract: Files relating to the planning and development of Kitimat, B.C..

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Architect. Milton Glass worked on the planned community of Kitimat, British Columbia. Commissioned by Alcan (Aluminum Company of Canada), it was to be British Columbia's first planned community: "Kitimat would be designed for the worker and his family. The fulfillment of people's needs as the focus of a town plan was considered revolutionary. Famed American architect and town planner Clarence S. Stein, and town planners Mayer & Whittlesey of New York fulfilled Alcan's goals. A green space model was chosen separating pedestrian and vehicular traffic and having home, store, and community building face peaceful open spaces, removed from intrusion and hazard by the automobile."

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files relating to the planning and development of Kitimat, B.C.. The Kitimat collection goes in depth into the planning and development of all aspects of the city, starting from choosing the designers and planners of the city and ending with the evaluation of the mostly finished town. The correspondences, meeting reports, and townsite planning reports show what the planners had in mind at the time and how the town slowly evolved to satisfy the townspeople physically, mentally, and culturally. The collection also includes many photographs used to plan the landscape and various blueprints and reports which show changes between the years of planning. Various publications and attempts to publicize and advertise the town is reflected. Conflicts with the municipal and provincial government are also listed as well as attempts to resolve the conflicts. Records, receipts, correspondences, and figures show the financial struggles in planning and developing the city.

The collection includes correspondences, maps, blueprints, reports, minutes of meetings, photographs, negatives, slides, publications, contracts, receipts, material lists, graphs, advertisements, and news clippings. Notable figures (in no particular order): ALCAN (Aluminum Company of Canada Ltd.), Clarence S. Stein, Julian Whittlesey, Wilbur Smith and Associates, Edmund T. Ames, Albert Mayer, William J. Conklin, Norman Klein, J. A. Currie, Wilfrid R. Ussner, Dan Kiley, James C. Buckley, Ralph Eberlin, Walter E. Kroening, Larry Smith, Lois Barclay, N. L. Engelhardt, Larry Smith, and Roger Willcox.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also the Clarence Stein papers, #3600, http://resolver.library.cornell.edu/cgi-bin/EADresolver?id=RMM03600

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Milton Glass files on Kitimat Canada #6896. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: From the Start of the Job Through to the End of W and C Participation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: On the front of the folder, it says: "KEEP THIS FILED AT THE BEGINNING OF THE KITIMAT JOB (this involves several job numbers)"

did.unittitle: Correspondence Between Partners of Mayer and Whittlesey re Alcan
Record of Plans and Reports Submitted to ALCAN
Sharp, Thompson, Berwick and Pratt - Architects for Alcan
Swan, Rhodes and Wooster Report on Kitimat River Bridge
Community Living - Planning for Reports by Lois Barclay Murphy
Community "A" - The First Neighborhood; Home, Plot and Road: House Types and Materials
Robert L. Davison (Howard T. Fisher Associates)
Semmons and Simpson - Architects for Alcan
River Control and Mr. K. Ross
Kitimat Master Plan Report Backups of Parts I, II, II, and Index
Part I of Report on Master Planning

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mimeographed copy of 6.0 "Townsite Physicla Planning" as prepared by Mr. Stein's office for inclusion in the Townsite Report

did.unittitle: House Types and Their Relation to Land and Living; Self-Building; Landscaping
First Interim Report (Land Use Study and Preliminary Master Plan)
Larry Smith Reports on Commercial Aspects of Kitimat and the Hotel Facility 1957
Larry Smith Reports on Commercial Aspects of Kitimat and the Hotel Facility 1952
Walter E. Kroening and Lawrence H. Tucker

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Report entitled "The Kitimat Project - Study of Service Personnel Requirements"; Organization - Personnel - Budget

Buckley Secion of Report on Kitimat

Customs Forms and Instructions on Their Use When Shipping Blueprints

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos, material lists, correspondence, plan reviews, project plans, landscape maps, cost analyses, planning maps, charts and figures, facility plans, reports

did.unittitle: Photographs of Kitimat, Kemano, and Nechako
Reports and Small Plans from Kitimat
Reports and Other Material Sent Direct from Kitimat to JW in Athens
Correspondence with Mariel Ames (includes Social Study of Kitimat)
Consultation with the Municipality Report: Parks and Recreation (Community Plan Report)
Record of Materials Sent to Julian Whittlesey in Athens, June 1960
Henry Strub (Aluminum Secretariat Ltd., in Montreal)
Miscellaneous Correspondence re Kitimat, Including Correspondence with Some Alcan People
Correspondence with Mrs. Meldrm (Editor, Northern Sentinel) and Planning Articles Therein by Edmund T. Ames
Industrial Development Report (Delta Area) by Hopkins
Background Info - Clippings, Reports, Minutes, etc.
Correspondence Reports and Bill re May/63 Trip
Traffic Survey Material Related to Wilber Smith File

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Traffic survey, various sketches and maps showing intersections, correspondence

did.unittitle: Portions of Minutes of Council Meetings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These items are mostly plan drawings for the Kitimat area. Includes plans for the Service Center of the Aluminum company of Canada and the Kitimat Townsite Report, 1960. Oversized portfolio, 2 copies; placed in the library vault, separate from the rest of the collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These items are mostly plan drawings for the Kitimat area. Includes plans for the Service Center of the Aluminum company of Canada and the Kitimat Townsite Report, 1960. Oversized portfolio, 2 copies; placed in the library vault, separate from the rest of the collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These items are mostly plan drawings for the Kitimat area. Includes plans for the Service Center of the Aluminum company of Canada and the Kitimat Townsite Report, 1960. Oversized portfolio, 2 copies; placed in the library vault, separate from the rest of the collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These items are mostly plan drawings for the Kitimat area. Includes plans for the Service Center of the Aluminum company of Canada and the Kitimat Townsite Report, 1960. Oversized portfolio, 2 copies; placed in the library vault, separate from the rest of the collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These items are mostly plan drawings for the Kitimat area. Includes plans for the Service Center of the Aluminum company of Canada and the Kitimat Townsite Report, 1960. Oversized portfolio, 2 copies; placed in the library vault, separate from the rest of the collection
